_meta.note: KRV-Validator endpoint map. 'verified:true' = endpoint confirmed by operator (trust live_status). 'verified:false' = HYPOTHESIS, must be confirmed before trusting live_status. PAT-005: unknown endpoints MUST stay auth_type=unknown / base_url='' so the validator writes live_status='unknown' rather than guessing.

cohere.instructions: HYPOTHESIS: Cohere v1 /models. Confirm actual models endpoint (Cohere v2 differs).

cerebras.instructions: HYPOTHESIS: Cerebras inference /v1/models. Confirm base URL.

cloudflare.instructions: HYPOTHESIS: CF Workers AI needs account_id substitution and uses /v1/models. Validator does NOT template account_id yet -> expect unknown until implemented.

elevenlabs.instructions: HYPOTHESIS: ElevenLabs v1. Not present in providers.json (no registry_name match). Confirm.

ocr-space.instructions: GAP: OCR.space has no /models endpoint; auth via 'apikey' query param, not Bearer. Validator cannot probe models here -> expect unknown until a provider-specific probe is added.

pollinations.instructions: HYPOTHESIS: Pollinations text models endpoint. Auth is open (no key). Confirm.

manus.instructions: UNKNOWN: Manus is not a standard LLM API with /models. Left unknown per PAT-005; needs a dedicated probe or exclusion.

cerebras-key.instructions: ALIAS: keys dropped as 'cerebras key.md' stored under 'cerebras-key'. Same endpoint as 'cerebras'.
